response.step_by_step_log:
1. Scene 1: Identified 'Cirno's Perfect Math Class' via on-screen text in Japanese. Performer identified as Biboo and another character. Search: 'Cirno's Perfect Math Class IOSYS Japanese and English lyrics'. Found lyrics.
2. Dialogue Transition: Detected period with no music.
3. Scene 2: Identified 'Make It Out Alive' via on-screen text. Performed by Biboo, Kanata, and La+ Darknesss. Search: 'Make It Out Alive ONE OK ROCK English lyrics'. Found lyrics.
4. Compiled data into JSON format.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring a medley of two songs: 'Cirno's Perfect Math Class' by IOSYS, and 'Make It Out Alive' by ONE OK ROCK. The video is divided into these two musical segments with a short dialogue-based transition.

scenes.description: Biboo and another character perform 'Cirno's Perfect Math Class' on stage. Song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.song_title: Cirno's Perfect Math Class (チルノのパーフェクトさんすう教室)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
みんなー！チルノのさんすう教室はじまるよー！
あたいみたいな天才になるし、がんばってね！
きらきらダイヤモンド、かがやく星のように
栄光、敗北、なにかを勝ち取れ
天才の頂点めざして、ゴーゴー！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Everyone! Cirno's math class is starting! 
Aiming to be a genius like me, do your best! 
Sparkling like a diamond, shining like a star 
Glory, defeat, somehow make your entrance 
Aim for the top of genius stupidity, go go!

scenes.description: Dialogue segment between Biboo, Kanata, and La+ Darknesss on stage.
Biboo, Kanata, and La+ Darknesss perform 'Make It Out Alive' on stage. Song title appears in the bottom-left corner.
scenes.performer_in_video: Biboo, Amane Kanata, and La+ Darknesss
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Run away, run away, run away
You don’t know who to run from
Nowhere to go, nowhere to go, nowhere to go
No road is left to run on
I was born, I was born with horns
Demons couldn’t shake me up
Bring it on, bring it on, bring it on
Cause we haven’t had enough
Won’t give up the fight
Make it out alive
Set this world on fire now
Woah (Woah), woah (Woah)
Don’t give up, it’s gonna be alright
Cause I won’t let you burn out
